title: Midnight at Blackthorn Manor
description: A storm, a locked study, and one guest who will not see dawn.

cast.name: The Butler
cast.bio: Unseen until needed; remembers every footstep.
cast.secret: You tampered with the study door.

cast.name: The Widow
cast.bio: Mourning in silk; sharper than she looks.

cast.name: The Doctor
cast.bio: Steady hands; a valise full of powders.
cast.secret: You brought the wrong phial on purpose.

events.title: Lights Out
events.text: The lights flicker and die, plunging the room into darkness for a moment.

events.title: Distant Scream
events.text: A distant scream is heard from upstairs.

events.title: Creaking Floorboard
events.text: A floorboard creaks in the hallway outside.

events.title: Smashed Window
events.text: The sound of a window being smashed is heard from the library.
